prompt: An anime-style illustration of a young woman with long dark hair wearing a dark jacket sitting on a rocky cliff edge, facing away to admire a vibrant sunset. To the right stands a red torii gate and two glowing stone lanterns. The foreground features scattered red maple leaves. Below stretches a vast mountainous landscape with a distant lake and a peak resembling Mt. Fuji. The sky is a breathtaking gradient of deep blue, purple, pink, and orange, detailed with clouds, stars, and two shooting stars. Highly detailed, cinematic anime background art.
